task_completion.description: Search for historical cases involving the subject 'Drake Antiquities'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search results page or case list in the ArkCase web interface showing the historical case titled 'Closed Investigation: Drake Antiquities - Import Audit 2022'.

task_completion.description: Open the historical case to verify the investigator and find the Case ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case details screen for 'Closed Investigation: Drake Antiquities - Import Audit 2022' is open, displaying its dynamically generated Case ID and listing 'Elena Fisher' as the investigator.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the new complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case details screen for 'New Complaint: Drake Antiquities - Unlicensed Artifacts' is open in the ArkCase interface.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a new note within the new complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Note', 'Add Note', or similar text input dialog/panel is open within the context of the 'New Complaint: Drake Antiquities - Unlicensed Artifacts' case.

task_completion.description: Save the note with the exact required conflict detection text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved note is visible in the new case's notes section containing the exact text 'Conflict Detected: Elena Fisher involved in prior Case [OLD_CASE_ID]', where [OLD_CASE_ID] is replaced by the actual Case ID of the historical case.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface rather than using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ArkCase GUI. There should be no terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts to fetch case IDs or post notes.

integrity.description: The note was entered into the actual ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The note text is typed into the ArkCase web interface's note input field or displayed in its native notes list, not just written in a separate text editor like Notepad or a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual dynamically generated historical case ID in the note.
integrity.visual_evidence: The note text contains a real ArkCase ID format (e.g., a numeric or alphanumeric string specific to the system) instead of the literal placeholder string '[OLD_CASE_ID]'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Subject: 'Drake Antiquities'. Investigator: 'Elena Fisher'. Historical Case Title: 'Closed Investigation: Drake Antiquities - Import Audit 2022'.
